examples:
Command Example
#
iot-security-resolve-vuln full_name=CVE-2019-10960 id=vuln-b12d4f0a reason=test
iot-security-get-device-by-ip
#
IoT get device command - get a single device's details.
Base Command
#

outputs.description: Device details. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.hostname The hostname of the device.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device

outputs.description: The IP address of the device. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.profile_type The device profile type: Non_IoT vs IoT.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.ip_address

outputs.description: The device profile vertical. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.category The device category
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.profile_vertical

outputs.description: The device profile. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.last_activity Date
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.profile

outputs.description: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.long_description The long description of the device. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.vlan
outputs.name: The last activity timestamp of the device.

outputs.description: The device VLAN ID. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.site_name The site which the device is in.
outputs.name: Number

outputs.description: The device risk score. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.risk_level The device risk level: Low, Medium, High, Critical
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.risk_score

outputs.description: The device subnet. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.first_seen_date Date
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.subnet

outputs.description: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.confidence_score The device confidence score. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.deviceid
outputs.name: The first seen date of the device.

outputs.description: The device ID. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.location The device location.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: The device vendor. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.model The device model.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.vendor

outputs.description: The device description. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.asset_tag The device asset tag (e.g. a sticky label at the bottom of the device).
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.description

outputs.description: The device OS group. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.Serial_Number The device serial number.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.os_group

outputs.description: Whether the device is in DHCP model: Valid values are Yes or No. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.wire_or_wireless Is the device wired or wireless.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.DHCP

outputs.description: The device department. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.Switch_Port The port of the switch this device is connected to.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.department

outputs.description: The name of the switch this device is connected to. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.Switch_IP The IP of the switch this device is connected to.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.Switch_Name

outputs.description: The IP of the access point this device is connected to. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.Access_Point_Name The name of the access point this device is connected to.
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.Access_Point_IP

outputs.description: The SSID of the wireless network this device is connected to. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.MAC Date
outputs.name: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.SSID

outputs.description: PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.display_tags The user tags of the device. PaloAltoNetworksIoT.Device.mac_address
outputs.name: The device MAC address.

outputs.description: The device MAC address. Edit this page Report an Issue
outputs.name: String

outputs.name: Previous

outputs.name: iot-security-list-devices
